cloud.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete profile "{{profileName}}"? This action cannot be undone.

connectConfirmation.message: Connecting to profile "{{profileName}}" will overwrite your current local configuration with the one stored in the profile. Do you want to continue?

importExport.cloudWarning: You have cloud sync enabled. Importing a backup will disconnect you from your sync profile. You will need to reconnect after import. Continue?
